openmeter/billing/charges/usagebased.purpose: Public domain contract package for usage-based charges: declares domain types (Charge, ChargeBase, Intent, State, Status, RealizationRun, DetailedLines, Expands), the Adapter interface (composed of five sub-interfaces + entutils.TxCreator), the Service interface, the Handler interface for ledger callbacks, and structured ValidationIssue error sentinels. It is the boundary consumed by usagebased/service and usagebased/adapter — no Ent or persistence imports belong here.

patterns.name: Input.Validate() gates every cross-boundary call
patterns.description: Every Input struct implements Validate() that collects errors via errors.Join and wraps with models.NewNillableGenericValidationError. Callers must call Validate() before passing to service or adapter methods.
patterns.example: func (i AdvanceChargeInput) Validate() error { var errs []error; if i.CustomerOverride.Customer == nil { errs = append(errs, errors.New("expanded customer is required")) }; return models.NewNillableGenericValidationError(errors.Join(errs...)) }

patterns.name: Adapter composed of five fine-grained sub-interfaces + TxCreator
patterns.description: Adapter embeds RealizationRunAdapter, RealizationRunCreditAllocationAdapter, RealizationRunInvoiceUsageAdapter, RealizationRunPaymentAdapter, ChargeAdapter, and entutils.TxCreator. New DB operations must be added to the matching sub-interface, not directly to Adapter.
patterns.example: type Adapter interface { RealizationRunAdapter; ChargeAdapter; entutils.TxCreator }

patterns.name: Dot-separated Status sub-states with ToMetaChargeStatus()
patterns.description: Status constants use dot notation for sub-states (e.g. StatusActivePartialInvoiceStarted = "active.partial_invoice.started"). ToMetaChargeStatus splits on the first dot to extract the canonical meta.ChargeStatus. New sub-states must be added to Values().

patterns.name: Expand dependency validation enforced in validateExpands
patterns.description: validateExpands (unexported) enforces that ExpandDetailedLines requires ExpandRealizations, and ExpandDeletedRealizations requires ExpandRealizations. All input types that accept Expands must call validateExpands.
patterns.example: if expands.Has(meta.ExpandDetailedLines) && !expands.Has(meta.ExpandRealizations) { return fmt.Errorf("%q requires %q", meta.ExpandDetailedLines, meta.ExpandRealizations) }

patterns.name: ValidationIssue sentinels with HTTP status codes in errors.go
patterns.description: Domain-specific business-rule violations are declared as package-level models.ValidationIssue vars with commonhttp.WithHTTPStatusCodeAttribute(http.StatusBadRequest). Use these sentinels instead of fmt.Errorf to get correct 4xx responses at the HTTP boundary.
patterns.example: var ErrChargeTotalIsNegative = models.NewValidationIssue(ErrCodeChargeTotalIsNegative, "charge total is negative", models.WithCriticalSeverity(), commonhttp.WithHTTPStatusCodeAttribute(http.StatusBadRequest))

patterns.name: UnimplementedHandler for compile-time interface coverage
patterns.description: UnimplementedHandler implements Handler returning errors.New("not implemented") for every method. Partial handler implementations embed UnimplementedHandler so new Handler methods don't break compilation of existing partial implementations.

patterns.name: RealizationRuns.WithoutVoidedBillingHistory() before aggregation
patterns.description: Deleted runs (DeletedAt != nil) and runs with Type=RealizationRunTypeInvalidDueToUnsupportedCreditNote are voided billing history. Always call WithoutVoidedBillingHistory() before Sum(), MapToBillingMeteredQuantity(), or BisectByTimestamp() to exclude them.

key_file_guides.role: Declares the Adapter interface and its five sub-interfaces. New DB operations must go into the matching sub-interface (ChargeAdapter, RealizationRunAdapter, etc.), never directly on Adapter.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding a method directly to Adapter instead of the appropriate sub-interface breaks callers that embed only the narrower interface.

key_file_guides.role: Core domain types: ChargeBase, Charge, Intent, State, Expands. GetFeatureKeyOrID has status-aware dispatch: created→key, deleted prefers ID then falls back to key, all other states use ID.
key_file_guides.watch_for: GetFeatureKeyOrID status dispatch must stay in sync with usagebased/service feature resolution — silent mismatch causes feature lookup failures.

key_file_guides.role: Declares Service (= UsageBasedService + GetLineEngine), all Input/Output types, and validateExpands. AdvanceChargeInput requires both expanded Customer and MergedProfile.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Omitting Customer or MergedProfile in AdvanceChargeInput passes Validate() but panics at runtime inside the state machine.

key_file_guides.role: Status type, all status constants including dot-separated sub-states, Values(), Validate(), ToMetaChargeStatus(). IsMutableFinalRealizationStatus and IsMutableInvoiceBackedRealizationStatus classify which states own mutable invoice lines.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New sub-states must be added to Values() and the dot-split logic in ToMetaChargeStatus must remain correct.

key_file_guides.role: RealizationRun, RealizationRunBase, RealizationRuns with BisectByTimestamp, MapToBillingMeteredQuantity, Sum. UpdateRealizationRunInput uses mo.Option fields.
key_file_guides.watch_for: UpdateRealizationRunInput fields must be set via mo.Some(...) — absent options are silently no-op'd by the adapter. RealizationRunTypeInvalidDueToUnsupportedCreditNote cannot be used as InitialType.

key_file_guides.role: Package-level ValidationIssue sentinels with HTTP status codes. Use these instead of fmt.Errorf for domain business-rule violations.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Generic fmt.Errorf returns for business violations produce 500 instead of 400 at the HTTP boundary.

key_file_guides.role: Handler interface for ledger callbacks (OnInvoiceUsageAccrued, OnPaymentAuthorized, OnPaymentSettled, OnCreditsOnlyUsageAccrued, OnCreditsOnlyUsageAccruedCorrection) and UnimplementedHandler base.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New Handler methods must be added to UnimplementedHandler or partial implementations will fail to compile.

key_file_guides.role: RateableIntent wraps Intent for rating.Service consumption. IsProgressivelyBilled always returns false; GetPreviouslyBilledAmount always returns zero — charges are never progressively billed.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding progressive-billing logic here breaks the rating invariant; charges do not support progressive billing.

anti_patterns: Adding Ent or persistence imports to this package — it is a pure domain contract package; all DB access belongs in usagebased/adapter.
Using fmt.Errorf for domain business-rule violations that have a ValidationIssue sentinel in errors.go — callers rely on error type assertions for HTTP status mapping.
Setting UpdateRealizationRunInput fields directly without mo.Some() — absent options are treated as no-op updates by the adapter.
Changing GetFeatureKeyOrID status dispatch without updating usagebased/service feature resolution to match — feature lookups will silently use the wrong ref type.
Adding a method directly to Adapter instead of the appropriate fine-grained sub-interface (ChargeAdapter, RealizationRunAdapter, etc.) — breaks callers that embed only the narrower interface.

decisions.decision: Dot-separated Status sub-states (e.g. active.partial_invoice.started) instead of a flat enum.
decisions.rationale: ToMetaChargeStatus extracts the canonical top-level status by splitting on the first dot, keeping the meta layer stable while the usagebased state graph evolves independently.

decisions.decision: ValidationIssue sentinels with WithHTTPStatusCodeAttribute declared in errors.go.
decisions.rationale: Domain errors carry their HTTP status so the commonhttp encoder produces correct 4xx responses without bespoke error-type switches in HTTP handler layers.

decisions.decision: RealizationRunTypeInvalidDueToUnsupportedCreditNote is a voided billing history marker retained for audit, never used as InitialType.
decisions.rationale: Audit trail requires the run to persist after the invoice line is removed; IsVoidedBillingHistory() excludes it from future rating and balance calculations without hard-deleting it.

code_examples.scenario: Adding a new service-layer input type for a usage-based charge operation
